description: Standalone catalog for three creative/CAD pipelines (Snap Lens, Blender MCP, AutoCAD MCP). orch_builder is the single entry point and connecting link; it classifies each task and routes to the owning pipeline coordinator (snap_001 / blender_001 / autocad_001) sequentially.

loading_rules.agent_default: Load only the catalog_file for the pipeline where you are primary, backup, or contributor. Never load other pipeline files unless explicitly requested.
loading_rules.manifest_consultation: Read this manifest first; orch_builder identifies the owning pipeline coordinator before any delegation.
loading_rules.senior_agent_operating_standard: MANDATORY for ALL agents: read and comply with C:/Users/fahad/OneDrive/Desktop/AgentsSnapBlenderAutoCAD/protocols/Senior_Agent_Operating_Standard.md (SAOS) before producing any output. Every output must be standards-grounded (C1), ASK-don't-guess (C2), methodology-driven (C3), coverage-traceable (C4), HARD-STOP before handoff (C5), clean-encoded (C6), and pass its Definition of Done (C7).

Snap_AR_Lenses.model_prep: snap_blender_001 + protocols/snap_blender_prep_pipeline.md (fix/prepare 3D models for Lens Studio via Blender)
Snap_AR_Lenses.game_support: AR Lens Games (single-player) via snap_014 (design) + snap_015 (engineering) + protocols/snap_game_templates/. NOT Snap Games/Bitmoji multiplayer platform.
Snap_AR_Lenses.beauty_makeup: snap_016 (AR Beauty/Makeup Specialist) — Face Retouch/Eye Color/Color Correction + Face Mesh makeup (lashes/blush on face UV). RULE: makeup = Face Mesh texture, NOT Image on eye-attachment (won't render).
Snap_AR_Lenses.file_engineering: snap_017 (LS File-Format Engineer) — direct BOM-safe editing of Scene.scene/.mat/ss_graph/GUIDs when GUI automation fails.
Snap_AR_Lenses.pipeline_qa: snap_qa_001 (Pipeline QA, Monitoring & Retrospective) — tests every phase visually, attributes defects to the responsible snap_* agent, teaches the lesson back (closed learning loop). Runs under snap_001. Verifies effects actually RENDER, not just exist in Hierarchy.
Snap_AR_Lenses._note: Snapchat filters (2D/Geofilter) and AR Lenses (Lens Studio) including SnapML. snap_001 is the entry point under orch_001 and never does domain work; it routes Phases sequentially to snap_002..snap_013 with snap_gate_001 as quality gate. Every lens project needs a CLAUDE.md from claude_template. HARD STOPs at Phase 7 (size/perf) and Phase 9 (Snap submission policy).

Blender_MCP._note: Drive Blender 5.1 directly via MCP (21 tools: scene/inspect, execute_blender_code, materials, PolyHaven, Sketchfab, Hyper3D Rodin gen). Runtime needs: Claude restarted (to load mcp__blender__*) + Blender open with addon Connected. Feeds snap_blender_001 (Snap model prep) and design_3d_001 (web 3D). Verify visually via get_viewport_screenshot; exports pass tools/verify_3d_asset.ps1.

AutoCAD_MCP.improvement_pipeline: protocols/autocad_improvement_pipeline.md (closed-loop self-learning, owner autocad_qa_001; runs at job START [LOAD lessons] + END [RETROSPECTIVE: capture→attribute→teach→verify]; stores in protocols/autocad_lessons/LEDGER.md + agent_<id>.md)
AutoCAD_MCP.mcp_server: puran-water/autocad-mcp v3.1 (registration in ~/.claude.json as 'autocad', launched via py312 interpreter)
AutoCAD_MCP.python_env: py312 = isolated uv-managed Python 3.12.13 at C:/AutoCAD_MCP/py312 — invoke C:/AutoCAD_MCP/py312/Scripts/python.exe (NEVER system 3.14). uv at C:/Users/fahad/.local/bin/uv.exe
AutoCAD_MCP.status: REGISTERED + CONNECTED (2026-06-09) — server cloned to C:/AutoCAD_MCP/autocad-mcp, deps in py312, MCP 'autocad' registered in ~/.claude.json (top-level, type stdio, launcher C:/AutoCAD_MCP/run_server.py, env AUTOCAD_MCP_BACKEND=auto), 'claude mcp list' shows Connected. PENDING: restart Claude to load mcp__autocad__* tools, then smoke test. For full File-IPC mode: open AutoCAD 2026 + APPLOAD C:/AutoCAD_MCP/autocad-mcp/lisp-code/mcp_dispatch.lsp (else ezdxf headless auto-fallback).
AutoCAD_MCP.bim_track: Optional future autocad_bim_001 via Autodesk APS / AEC Data Model MCP (cloud BIM/Revit/ACC data queries; needs APS account). Documented in pipeline §6, not built.
AutoCAD_MCP._note: Drive AutoCAD via MCP (8 consolidated tools: drawing, entity, layer, block, annotation, pid, view, system+execute_lisp). Two backends: File-IPC (needs AutoCAD running + mcp_dispatch.lsp via APPLOAD — full incl. P&ID/3D/LISP/PDF) and ezdxf (headless 2D DXF, no AutoCAD). autocad_001 is entry under orch_001; routes Phases 0-6 to autocad_002..009 (008=architectural floor plans/space planning/image-trace, 009=sheet layout/paper-space/plotting). autocad_research_001 runs as a gate at the END of Phase 0 (requirements analysis) BEFORE execution: maps required capabilities vs current agents+lessons, researches gaps, emits a Capability-Gap Report (PROCEED/SEED-FIRST/CREATE-FIRST); on approval routes seeding to autocad_qa_001 and new-agent creation to agent_factory_001. execute_lisp = AutoCAD analog of execute_blender_code. Verify visually via view(operation=screenshot). Windows-only for File-IPC. Sibling of Blender_MCP.
